# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: microservice-deployment # Name of your app
  labels:
    app: my-microservices  # Replace with your application name
    version: 0.9            # Update this field for every deploy, so that you can easily identify releases in the Istio Dashboard.
  annotations:                # Add the following 3 annotations to configure sidecar injection behavior 
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"   
spec:
   replicas: 1                     # Update this field if you want more than one microservice pod running, by default it runs only once.
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-microservices     # Replace with your application name 
  template:                       
     metadata:
         labels:
           app: my-microservices   # Replace with your application name
